source_pr.title: executor: fix tidb crash when shuffleExec quit unexpectedly
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/48230

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
  Test issue https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/48230 by manual
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
Fix tidb crash when shuffleExec quit unexpectedly
```

symptoms: err := tk.QueryToErr("SELECT SUM(i) OVER W FROM t1 WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY j ORDER BY i) ORDER BY 1+SUM(i) OVER w;") (pkg/executor/executor_failpoint_test.go)
failure_signature: err := tk.QueryToErr("SELECT SUM(i) OVER W FROM t1 WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY j ORDER BY i) ORDER BY 1+SUM(i) OVER w;") (pkg/executor/executor_failpoint_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: ShuffleExec runs multiple goroutines (fetch/split per data source + worker goroutines). When a worker exits/panics unexpectedly, the original implementation did not track all goroutines in the WaitGroup and could also block on a too-small output channel buffer, leading to crashes or hangs during early-exit cleanup. The fix increases the output channel buffer and ensures the WaitGroup accounts for both workers and fetch goroutines (with proper Done) so ShuffleExec can exit safely under failure.
fix_pattern: Make ShuffleExec goroutine lifecycle deterministic (WaitGroup covers fetch+workers) and buffer output channel to avoid crash on early exit.

evidence: evidence: err := tk.QueryToErr("SELECT SUM(i) OVER W FROM t1 WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY j ORDER BY i) ORDER BY 1+SUM(i) OVER w;") (pkg/executor/executor_failpoint_test.go)
